description: Create a Talon module in C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\ncic_formatter\ that translates spoken physical descriptions into strict FBI NCIC 3-character codes. The module must implement ncic_lists.py (defining user.ncic_eye_color and user.ncic_hair_color with mappings for eyes: black=BLK, blue=BLU, brown=BRO, gray=GRY, green=GRN, hazel=HAZ, maroon=MAR, pink=PNK, unknown=XXX; and hair: bald=BAL, black=BLK, blond=BLN, brown=BRO, gray=GRY, red=RED, sandy=SDY, white=WHI, unknown=XXX), ncic_actions.py (defining an @mod.action_class with ncic_format_weight for 3-digit padding and ncic_format_height for feet/inches conversion), and ncic_commands.talon (providing voice commands 'suspect eyes {user.ncic_eye_color}', 'suspect hair {user.ncic_hair_color}', 'suspect weight <number>', and 'suspect height <number> foot <number>' that utilize the defined lists and actions).
